min_total_records.description: main-path alert evaluation must see at least one live record

min_main_path_pass_rate.description: main path must stay authoritative for every evaluated live record

max_primary_path_degraded_count.description: primary path must not degrade during release evaluation

max_decision_unlocked_count.description: evaluated live records must keep decision_locked=true

max_fallback_authority_count.description: fallback paths must not become the final authority

max_agent_products_error_fallback_count.description: agent_products_error_fallback must not appear in release evaluation

max_service_version_commit_missing_count.description: service_version.commit must be present for all evaluated live records

max_governance_would_enforce_count.description: governance shadow should not observe would-enforce drift during evaluation
